label: Standard — health and wellness podcast pitching supplement brand

input.podcast_topic: Health and nutrition science for people who want to separate evidence from marketing
input.audience_description: Health-conscious adults 28-50 who are skeptical of wellness trends and want research-backed information
input.brand: A protein supplement company that uses third-party testing and publishes their lab results — positioned as the transparent alternative in a misleading market
input.offering: Mid-roll host-read (60 sec), 4-episode minimum, host endorsement available (host has used the product for 8 months)

input.podcast_topic: DIY crafts, woodworking, and handmade goods for hobby makers
input.audience_description: Adults who enjoy making things by hand as a hobby, mostly weekend crafters
input.brand: An online craft supply store specializing in high-quality wood finishing products

label: European context — European history podcast pitching travel company

input.podcast_topic: European history from the medieval period to the 20th century, told through specific places, events, and individuals
input.audience_description: History enthusiasts and European travelers aged 30-55 who enjoy visiting the places they learn about. Many plan trips around historical sites.
input.brand: A European cultural tour company offering small-group guided tours of historical cities (Rome, Prague, Istanbul, Edinburgh, Vienna), priced at 1,500-3,500 EUR per tour
input.offering: Mid-roll host-read (60 sec), 6-episode minimum across two months, with a dedicated 'History Travel Guide' bonus episode sponsored by the brand
input.audience_demographics: 55% 35-55, high education level, top markets UK (22%), USA (20%), Germany (12%), Netherlands (8%), France (7%)
input.notable_guests: University historians, museum curators, heritage site directors
